# Initialize Workflow Variables

## Objective

Initialize workflow variables before the AI agents begin processing the request.

## Purpose

Workflow variables store values that are required throughout the automation. They allow different modules to access and update shared information without hardcoding values.

Two variables are initialized at the start of the workflow:

* **seo_score** – Stores the SEO quality score generated by the SEO Quality Review Agent.
* **optimization_attempt** – Tracks the number of optimization attempts performed.

## Workflow Position

```text
Google Forms Trigger
        │
        ▼
Connection Filter
        │
        ▼
Set Multiple Variables
        │
        ▼
SEO Strategy Agent
```

## Make.com Module

**Module**

```
Tools → Set Multiple Variables
```

## Variables

| Variable             | Initial Value | Purpose                       |
| -------------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------- |
| seo_score            | 0             | Stores the SEO quality score. |
| optimization_attempt | 1             | Tracks optimization attempts. |

## Expected Output

The workflow initializes both variables, making them available for all downstream modules.

## Success Criteria

* seo_score initialized to 0
* optimization_attempt initialized to 1
* Variables available to subsequent modules
